level_signals: 8+ years of program or project management experience
Sets strategic direction for tooling and workflows
Owns CLM technology roadmap and backlog
Base salary range $148,835–$175,100 consistent with senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of program or project management experience within Legal Operations, contract management, or a technology-driven operations function, with a track record of setting strategic direction for tooling and workflows, not just executing on them.

Demonstrated experience owning a technology roadmap and backlog, including prioritizing build-vs-buy decisions, scoping in-house development work, and partnering with engineering and architecture teams to deliver integrated solutions.

Expert-level, hands-on experience with Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM) systems (Ironclad required), including workflow design, template management, reporting, and integration planning with platforms like Salesforce.

Proven ability to drive AI and automation adoption within a team, including evaluating tools, building proof of concepts, and leading enablement programs that result in measurable workflow improvements.

Working knowledge of legal technology and AI-driven contract review tools (e.g., Evisort), with experience in data extraction, metadata management, and building reporting frameworks that serve as the system of record for agreements.
Utilizes generative AI responsibly, maintaining human oversight to deliver business-ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in workflow efficiency, cost, and quality.

scope.surface: Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM) ecosystem within Coinbase's Legal Operations team
primary_metrics_inferred: AI/automation adoption and measurable workflow efficiency gains
Data integrity and reporting accuracy for agreements
core_responsibilities: Own the CLM technology roadmap and backlog, setting strategic direction for Ironclad, Evisort, Salesforce, and emerging tools
Lead in-house builds and workflow development partnering with Enterprise Architecture and Engineering
Drive AI enablement for the Legal Operations team including proof of concepts (N8N, Workato, Claude, Glean) and adoption programs
Develop and manage the comprehensive contracts reporting framework and system of record
Communicate roadmap enhancements and strategic recommendations to senior stakeholders
Lead large, cross-functional contracts initiatives end-to-end

compensation.equity_form: equity eligibility mentioned alongside bonus and benefits

green_flags: Remote-first company with clearly described in-person cadence (quarterly surges)
Clear scope of ownership — CLM ecosystem with named tools
Strategic role with engineering partnership, not just configuration
Role ID and #LI-Remote tag confirm remote eligibility
red_flags: No visa sponsorship information provided — unclear for international applicants
Ironclad is listed as a hard requirement ('required'), which is a narrow tool-specific bar
AI-based initial screening interview mentioned — may disadvantage some candidates
Quarterly surges (mandatory in-person travel) not fully detailed in scope or frequency
